title: Review the uncommitted changes. Context: # Coder Handoff ## Task Review failed: review score 4/10 (min 7): If score < 7, list specific issues to fix (max 5 items). ## Changed Files .gitignore assets/hooks/context-monitor.sh assets/scripts/canon-launch.sh assets/scripts/canon-v3-sim-coder.sh assets/s...
summary_text: ISSUES TO FIX: 1. [assets/hooks/context-monitor.sh:65](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/hooks/context-monitor.sh#L65) now emits only `{"systemMessage": ...}`. The hook JSON contract elsewhere in this repo expects a `decision` field, so this warning path is likely malformed/ignored and the context-pressure alert stops surfacing when it matters. 2. [assets/skills/bookkeeping/scripts/freee-client.mjs:189](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/bookkeeping/scripts/freee-client.mjs#L189) only escalates `401/403/429/5xx`; other HTTP failures like `400/404/409/422` are returned as if successful. [assets/skills/bookkeeping/scripts/bookkeeping-apply.mjs:75](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/bookkeeping/scripts/bookkeeping-apply.mjs#L75) and [assets/skills/bookkeeping/scripts/bookkeeping-apply.mjs:144](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/bookkeeping/scripts/bookkeeping-apply.mjs#L144) then mark update/upload actions as applied without validating the response body, so failed freee writes can be recorded as successes. 3. [assets/skills/research-loop/eval-skill.sh:388](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/research-loop/eval-skill.sh#L388) hard-allowlists many non-portable commands (`gh`, `codex`, `tmux`, `cmux`, `pbcopy`, `pm2`, etc.). That defeats Check 2’s stated purpose: a skill can now reference a missing binary and still avoid the phantom-command penalty. 4. [.gitignore:9](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/.gitignore#L9) only ignores `.canon/`, but this patch also tracks machine-local runtime state such as [assets/skills/notebooklm-shared/.fugue-managed-notebooklm:2](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/notebooklm-shared/.fugue-managed-notebooklm#L2) and [assets/skills/bookkeeping/scripts/.claude/.project-init-status:1](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/bookkeeping/scripts/.claude/.project-init-status#L1). Those files embed local paths, counters, and timestamps and will create constant noisy diffs across machines. 5. [assets/skills/bookkeeping/experience.jsonl:96](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/bookkeeping/experience.jsonl#L96), [assets/skills/bookkeeping/experience.jsonl:124](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/bookkeeping/experience.jsonl#L124), and [assets/skills/slide/experience.jsonl:68](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/slide/experience.jsonl#L68) are committing raw session telemetry and prompt/terminal content into the repo. That is both review noise and a data-leak risk; this should be moved to ignored local storage or explicitly sanitized before versioning. SCORE: 4/10
